strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across multiple domains, exceeding the 15-year minimum requirement
Demonstrated technical leadership as Staff Software Engineer with proven mentoring through workshops, public talks, and community contribution
Modern full-stack technical fluency with TypeScript, cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and multiple programming languages
concerns: No demonstrated deep AI/ML expertise or recognized AI products/platforms—current AI work appears implementation-focused (MCP code generators, agent infrastructure) rather than strategic
No advanced degree in AI-related field, and no evidence of strategic advisory relationships with customers or partners at executive level
Broad technical generalization across many domains suggests depth in engineering execution rather than specialized expertise in AI strategy and innovation
response.justification: Szabo brings solid technical leadership credentials with two decades of engineering experience and demonstrated mentoring capability. However, the role explicitly requires 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI,' and his resume shows only recent implementation-level AI work with no strategic products or established thought leadership in AI. The absence of an advanced AI/ML degree, deep AI/ML expertise, or evidence of strategic advisory work at scale creates a significant misalignment with the director-level AI Strategy specialist expectations.
